hero.name: José
hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: Creating exceptional digital experiences with modern technologies

about.title: About Me
about.bio: Full Stack Developer passionate about creating efficient and scalable solutions. Specialized in .NET, React and modern architectures.
about.intro: My focus is on writing clean, maintainable and scalable code, applying industry best practices such as Clean Architecture and CQRS.
about.passion: I'm passionate about learning new technologies and applying them in real projects that generate value. From modern web applications to robust backend systems, I enjoy every stage of development.
about.approach: I work on both freelance and personal projects, always seeking to exceed client expectations and deliver high-quality solutions that truly solve problems.

experience.title: Experience & Education
experience.subtitle: My professional journey and academic background

bullets.ancer_b1: Development and maintenance of modules in Core360 ERP, a multi-module enterprise system.
bullets.ancer_b2: Implementation of backend features with .NET and C#, integrating complex business logic.
bullets.ancer_b3: Remote collaboration in an agile team, participating in code reviews and iterative deliveries.
bullets.clauKyc_b1: Development of the CLAU KYC system for digitizing and managing compliance processes.
bullets.clauKyc_b2: Full-stack architecture with ASP.NET Core 9 backend and React 18 + Vite frontend.
bullets.clauKyc_b3: Containerized deployment with Docker and CapRover, plus transactional email integration via Brevo.
bullets.clauContable_b1: Support in accounting processes and review of financial statements for firm clients.
bullets.clauContable_b2: Technical assistance with equipment, software, and team productivity tools.
bullets.clauContable_b3: Management and organization of digital documents and client databases.

degrees.iced_degree: Science High School Diploma, Computer Science Track

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk!
contact.tagline: Available for freelance projects and job opportunities. I respond in under 24h.

universe.title: My Universe
universe.subtitle: The things that make me who I am

anime.title: Anime & Manga
anime.text: I generally love the world of anime and manga — I've read light novels from my favorite series, I love watching romance and action anime, and I have my all-time favorites plus many others I adore. My favorite character right now is Choso from Jujutsu Kaisen.

series.title: Series
series.text: I enjoy many types of series, but action, superhero or survival shows are my favorites. Some with suspense and bloody drama like You or The Boys are shows I really enjoy. A guilty pleasure I picked up were kdramas — there are romantic kdramas so beautiful they melt your heart, and others that show very powerful sides of society. There are also action ones; one I highly recommend is Vagabond.

music.title: Music
music.text: Musically I have an incredibly varied taste — I can enjoy any type of Spanish song: reggaeton, salsa, merengue, vallenato, típico, bachata, rock... But I also love English pop, Japanese pop, anime openings, and K-pop with many bands and idols. Going deeper: rock and metalcore, Luis Miguel, boleros... There's too much I could mention, but this is what I normally listen to.

gaming.title: Gaming
gaming.text: I'm a fan of arcade and RPG games — I love immersing myself in their worlds without following a specific path. Games like Octopath Traveler, Dark Souls, Celeste, Silksong, Hades, Stardew Valley, Elden Ring, Sekiro. On the popular side: Genshin Impact, Honkai Star Rail, League of Legends, osu!, Minecraft, Fortnite. And personal favorites: Uncharted, The Walking Dead, God of War.

footer.built: Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS

sistemaPlanilla.title: Planilla — Payroll SaaS for Panama
sistemaPlanilla.description: Multi-tenant enterprise payroll system with Law 462 (CSS), SE, ISR compliance and Panamanian labor regulations.
sistemaPlanilla.longDescription: Multi-tenant enterprise payroll system for companies in Panama, with compliance for Law 462 (CSS), Educational Insurance, Income Tax and local labor regulations. Clean Architecture, Stripe subscriptions and per-tenant roles. Available at pagly.clau.com.pa (landing) and app.pagly.clau.com.pa (app).

clauFormulario.title: CLAU Form - Freelance Project
clauFormulario.description: Production form system for CLAU company
clauFormulario.longDescription: Freelance project in production used by CLAU company. Modern stack with ASP.NET Core 9 backend, React 18 + Vite frontend, containerized with Docker and CapRover ready. Integration with Brevo for email management.
clauFormulario.galleryDesc1: Instant confirmation sent to the client after submitting the form. Shows that their message was successfully received and provides a reference number. Transactional email sent via Brevo with custom HTML template.
clauFormulario.galleryDesc2: Notification email sent to the CLAU team with all contact data. Includes structured lead information, timestamp and option for Google Sheets integration for automatic lead tracking.

menuDigital.title: VOR-MENU - Digital Menu PWA
menuDigital.description: Progressive Web App for restaurant menus
menuDigital.longDescription: Modern PWA for digital menu visualization with product management, categories and real-time availability. Includes complete admin panel with authentication, CRUD for categories and products, and bilingual support.
menuDigital.galleryDesc1: Light theme of the digital menu, perfect for well-lit environments. Clean and professional design with excellent contrast that makes product names and prices easy to read. Ideal for daytime use or well-lit restaurants.
menuDigital.galleryDesc2: Dark theme of the digital menu, ideal for low-light environments. Reduces eye strain in low-light conditions, perfect for bars or restaurants with dim ambiance. Colors automatically adjust while maintaining readability and elegant design.

formularioVorluno.title: Vorluno Contact Form
formularioVorluno.longDescription: Enterprise-grade contact form with React frontend and ASP.NET Core backend. Optimized for CapRover deployment with Docker, includes email notifications via Brevo and optional Google Sheets integration.
formularioVorluno.galleryDesc1: Automatic confirmation email sent to the user after completing the form. Includes unique reference number and confirmation that their message was received. Custom HTML template sent via Brevo with brand-consistent design.
formularioVorluno.galleryDesc2: Notification email sent to the administrator with complete contact information. Includes all structured form data, timestamp and metadata. Optionally integrates with Google Sheets for automatic tracking of all leads.
